series_metadata.series_description: Records generated for crisis management in the event of a crisis situation at an agency facility. The documents are compiled in a uniform format to be used as a plan to be followed when an emergency situation occurs.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: Maintain most updated version. outdated or superseded records when no longer of administrative value. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records. ; Paper: Maintain most updated version. outdated or superseded records when no longer of administrative value. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records
